Operation 'getClashPlayersByPuuid' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify the action (retrieving registration data). Description lacks detail about what is returned and the purpose of the data. Added context about return type (list of ClashPlayer objects), what information is included, and the practical use case for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve clash registration for a player.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves clash tournament registration information for a player identified by their encrypted PUUID. Returns a list of ClashPlayer objects containing the player's tournament registrations, team assignments, and participation status. This endpoint helps determine if a player is registered for upcoming clash tournaments.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify the action (retrieving registration data). Description lacks detail about what is returned and the purpose of the data. Added context about return type (list of ClashPlayer objects), what information is included, and the practical use case for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getClashTeam' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic and doesn't specify the lookup method (by ID). Description is minimal and doesn't explain what data is returned. Enhanced summary to clarify the lookup parameter and improved description to specify the return type (ClashTeam object) and what information it contains, helping AI agents understand the endpoint's purpose and output.

data.current_description: Retrieve a clash team by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve clash team details by team ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific clash team using its team ID. Returns a ClashTeam object containing team composition, roster information, tournament details, and team status. Use this endpoint to get comprehensive team data for a specific clash tournament team.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't specify the lookup method (by ID). Description is minimal and doesn't explain what data is returned. Enhanced summary to clarify the lookup parameter and improved description to specify the return type (ClashTeam object) and what information it contains, helping AI agents understand the endpoint's purpose and output.

message: Operation 'getChampionMasteries' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description is mostly clear but lacks explicit information about the return type and structure. Adding details about the response format (list of ChampionMastery objects) improves AI agent interpretability when deciding how to use this data.

data.current_description: Retrieve all champion mastery entries for a summoner sorted by number of champion points descending.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all champion mastery entries for a summoner, sorted by champion points in descending order. Returns a list of ChampionMastery objects containing mastery level, points, and champion information for each champion the summoner has played.
data.reasoning: Description is mostly clear but lacks explicit information about the return type and structure. Adding details about the response format (list of ChampionMastery objects) improves AI agent interpretability when deciding how to use this data.

message: Operation 'getChampionMasteryByChampion' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is vague about what data is returned. Enhanced description specifies the return type (ChampionMastery object) and key fields (mastery level, points, last play time) to help AI agents understand what information they can extract from this operation.

data.current_summary: Get champion mastery by champion ID
data.current_description: Retrieve champion mastery for a specific champion for a summoner.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve champion mastery data for a specific champion for a summoner. Returns a ChampionMastery object containing the summoner's mastery level, total champion points, and last play time for the specified champion.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what data is returned. Enhanced description specifies the return type (ChampionMastery object) and key fields (mastery level, points, last play time) to help AI agents understand what information they can extract from this operation.

message: Operation 'getTopChampionMasteries' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about what 'top' means (sorted by level), the input parameter (encrypted PUUID), and the structure of returned data. Added specifics about sorting order, return type, and key fields to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the top champion mastery entries for a summoner.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the top champion mastery entries for a summoner identified by their encrypted PUUID. Returns a list of ChampionMastery objects sorted by mastery level in descending order. Includes champion ID, mastery level, mastery points, and last played timestamp for each champion.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what 'top' means (sorted by level), the input parameter (encrypted PUUID), and the structure of returned data. Added specifics about sorting order, return type, and key fields to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getChampionMasteryScore' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description incorrectly states the score is 'sum of all champions' levels' when it's actually cumulative points. Missing input parameter context (encrypted PUUID) and output format (integer). Corrected terminology and added clarity about what the score represents for better AI agent interpretation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the total champion mastery score (sum of all champions' levels) for a summoner.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the total champion mastery score for a summoner identified by their encrypted PUUID. Returns an integer representing the cumulative mastery points across all champions. This score reflects the summoner's overall progression in champion mastery.
data.reasoning: Description incorrectly states the score is 'sum of all champions' levels' when it's actually cumulative points. Missing input parameter context (encrypted PUUID) and output format (integer). Corrected terminology and added clarity about what the score represents for better AI agent interpretation.

message: Operation 'getChampionRotations' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too minimal. Missing context about what data is returned (ChampionInfo structure), whether authentication is required, and the practical use case. Added details about return structure and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when to call this endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve the current free champion rotation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current free champion rotation for League of Legends. Returns a ChampionInfo object containing lists of free-to-play champion IDs and their availability windows. This endpoint requires no authentication and is useful for determining which champions are available without purchase.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Missing context about what data is returned (ChampionInfo structure), whether authentication is required, and the practical use case. Added details about return structure and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when to call this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getLeagueEntriesBySummoner' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks specificity about which queues are included and what data is returned. Missing input parameter context and output structure details. Added queue types and LeagueEntry fields to improve AI agent's ability to determine if this operation provides needed ranked data.

data.current_description: Retrieve league entries for a summoner across all queues.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve ranked league entries for a summoner identified by their encrypted summoner ID across all ranked queues (Solo/Duo, Flex 5v5, Flex 3v3). Returns a list of LeagueEntry objects containing rank, tier, LP, and win/loss statistics for each queue the summoner has played in.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about which queues are included and what data is returned. Missing input parameter context and output structure details. Added queue types and LeagueEntry fields to improve AI agent's ability to determine if this operation provides needed ranked data.

message: Operation 'getLeagueEntries' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too generic and lacks critical context about valid parameter values, pagination support, and return structure. Missing details about what queue/tier/division combinations are valid and how pagination works. Enhanced with specific valid values and pagination details for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Retrieve league entries for a given queue, tier, and division.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve league entries by queue, tier, and division
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all league entries for a specific ranked queue, tier, and division.
